headline: Water Quality Issues Affect 2.4 Million Residents in 5 States
context: DOE reports persistent water quality problems from pollution and aging infrastructure affecting millions.

cards.big: 2.4 million people in 5 states receive water that periodically fails quality standards
cards.sub: Selangor Johor Sabah Kelantan and Pahang report most frequent incidents

cards.big: 280 water disruption events caused by river pollution recorded nationwide in 2025
cards.sub: Industrial discharge and sewage overflow are the primary contamination sources

cards.big: 42% of Malaysia's water pipe network is over 30 years old with non-revenue water at 35%
cards.sub: Aging infrastructure leaks and contaminates water before it reaches consumers

cards.big: Japan maintains 99.9% safe drinking water coverage through 10-year pipe replacement cycles
cards.sub: Systematic infrastructure renewal prevents contamination and reduces losses

cards.big: Clean water is not a luxury—it is the most basic public health requirement
Should Malaysia mandate accelerated water pipe replacement with dedicated infrastructure bonds
